name: local
notes: The 'Local' panel does not host a real web page — Phase 4.1 chunk F will fill its panel cell with a minimal native chat surface rendered by VELO (composer + reply area) wrapped inside an about:blank webview so the same bridge can drive it. Selectors here match the IDs that surface will use. Outbound prompts go through the moderator ChatDelegate (DirectChatAdapter from v2.4.42), NOT to a remote page.
